subject: refactor: codebase audit — extract event bus, fix leak, remove dead code, harden localStorage
body:
Full codebase audit addressing dead code, hacks, and bad practices:

- Extract shared createEventBus<T>() utility (utils/eventBus.ts), replacing
  duplicated event system boilerplate in graphService, viewService, and
  workspaceService. This also fixes a bug where viewService.emit() was
  missing try/catch around listener callbacks.

- Fix setInterval memory leak in usePWAUpdate — the 60-minute SW update
  check interval had no cleanup path. Store interval ID in ref, clear on
  unmount and on re-registration.

- Remove ~400 lines of dead code:
  - QueryBar.tsx (legacy, replaced by QueryBuilder)
  - useViewData.ts (hook never imported)
  - CSV import utilities (parseCsvString, parseCsvLines, mapCsvToNodeData,
    autoSuggestMappings, ColumnMapping, CsvParseResult)
  - getNextColor() in workspaceService (never called)
  - parseQuery()/QueryFilter in queryEngine (superseded by AST parser)

- Clean up ViewConfiguration type — remove 6 unused fields (defaultQuery,
  layout, sortBy, filters, rendering, timeProperty) and orphaned
  FilterConfig interface.

- Add safeStorage.ts utility with safeGetItem/safeSetItem/safeRemoveItem
  for localStorage in restricted environments (Safari private browsing).
  Applied to useWorkspaces, App.tsx, TutorialModal, seedService.

- Update all affected tests and documentation.

Tags: audit, dead-code, event-bus, memory-leak, localStorage, refactor
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-audit
Semver: patch
